tags.name: `mc-avatar`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display user avatars with optional tooltips and badges
Category: Content Display
When to use: User profiles, Comment sections, Team member lists
When not to use: Decorative images, Large hero images
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card
Alternative component names: User Avatar, Profile Picture, User Icon

Events:

  * ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the avatar is clicked.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - 

Slots:

  * ``info`` {} - The info HTML to use for the mc-avatar.

  * ``badge`` {} - Used if you want to attach badge to the mc-avatar.

Attributes:

  * `appearance` {`AvatarAppearance`} - Appearance that sets different background-color and color on avatar.

  * `fit` {`FitExtended`} - Fit of the avatar.

  * `hiddentooltip` {`boolean`} - Hides tooltip when set

  * `clickable` {`boolean`} - If set, the avatar will get a pointer cursor and will be accessible via keyboard navigation. You can then listen to the `click` event to handle the click event, optionally handle you application router and redirects.

  * `imagesrc` {`string`} - Avatar image src, if not provided default avatar image will be rendered

  * `info` {`string | undefined`} - Info added as description to the tooltip, if tooltip is hidden, the info will be displayed as hidden on screen description, which is still available for screen readers

  * `initials` {`string`} - Initials displayed instead of image

Properties:

  * `emptyImage` {`string`} - 

  * `_onTriggerClick` - 

  * `_onTriggerKeyDown` - 

  * `appearance` {`AvatarAppearance`} - Appearance that sets different background-color and color on avatar.

  * `fit` {`FitExtended`} - Fit of the avatar.

  * `hiddentooltip` {`boolean`} - Hides tooltip when set

  * `clickable` {`boolean`} - If set, the avatar will get a pointer cursor and will be accessible via keyboard navigation. You can then listen to the `click` event to handle the click event, optionally handle you application router and redirects.

  * `imagesrc` {`string`} - Avatar image src, if not provided default avatar image will be rendered

  * `info` {`string | undefined`} - Info added as description to the tooltip, if tooltip is hidden, the info will be displayed as hidden on screen description, which is still available for screen readers

  * `initials` {`string`} - Initials displayed instead of image

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {`AvatarAppearance`} - Appearance that sets different background-color and color on avatar.

Property: appearance

Default: color-1

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`FitExtended`} - Fit of the avatar.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: hiddentooltip
attributes.description:
`hiddentooltip` {`boolean`} - Hides tooltip when set

Property: hiddentooltip

Default: false

attributes.name: clickable
attributes.description:
`clickable` {`boolean`} - If set, the avatar will get a pointer cursor and will be accessible via keyboard navigation. You can then listen to the `click` event to handle the click event, optionally handle you application router and redirects.

Property: clickable

Default: false

attributes.name: imagesrc
attributes.description:
`imagesrc` {`string`} - Avatar image src, if not provided default avatar image will be rendered

Property: imagesrc

Default: emptyImage

attributes.name: info
attributes.description:
`info` {`string | undefined`} - Info added as description to the tooltip, if tooltip is hidden, the info will be displayed as hidden on screen description, which is still available for screen readers

Property: info

attributes.name: initials
attributes.description:
`initials` {`string`} - Initials displayed instead of image

Property: initials

Default:

attributes.name: on`click`
attributes.description: ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the avatar is clicked.
